description: Hook interfaces for intercepting agent loop lifecycle: context transforms, LLM conversion, tool call boundaries, cancellation, and message providers.

files.responsibility: Transform the message context before LLM call — filter, augment, or rewrite messages.
Convert AgentMessage list into a MessageBag for LLM provider consumption.
Intercept before LLM provider call — can return a ProviderRequest to modify/override.
Intercept before tool execution — can return BeforeToolCallResult to modify/skip call.
Intercept after tool execution — can return AfterToolCallResult to modify result.
No-op cancellation token — always returns false. Read-only value object.
Provides steering messages injected at start of context to guide agent behavior.
Provides follow-up messages appended after the main context.
